Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "node_id": "0118",
  "title": "AI搞怪开头+短视频病毒meme+热梗化用",
  "page_index": 62,
  "page_range": "62-63"
}

Section text:
AI搞怪开头 +短视频病毒 meme+ 热梗化用
休闲手游  热门创意策略
Source ：广大大 -广告创意模块，选取时间段内热度最高创意素材展现
Date Range ：2025/1~2025/12热门玩法：
跑酷、跳跃、消除、水排序
常用素材套路：
AI开头→切入游戏实机画面 →玩法
展示
热门短视频开头 →游戏内还原 →玩
法展示
未来创意趋势：
更多休闲创意取材于 TikTok 热热门
视频，甚至于直接用博主视频作推
广用，搞怪有趣成为买量素材开头
的核心标准，
点击图片播放完整创意
62
Source ：广大大 -广告主分析模块，选取时间段内新投放展现或热度表现较高素材展现
Date Range ：2025/1~2025/12

79.8% 80.1%81.2% 80.8%85.9% 85.9%
84.4%86.8%

月均素材量 当月新素材占比麻将连连看、数独、字谜、接龙横扫投放总榜 TOP20 ，视频素材展现占比远高于其他品类

message.content: This section answers retrieval queries regarding 2025 casual mobile game advertising strategies, creative workflows, and performance metrics. **Topics & Procedures:** Details the adoption of AI-generated quirky openings, viral short video memes, and trending internet tropes, outlining standard creative workflows: "AI opening → actual gameplay → gameplay showcase" and "viral video opening → in-game recreation → gameplay showcase." **Entities & Genres:** Covers casual mobile games, popular mechanics (parkour, jumping, matching, water sorting), and top-performing puzzle genres (Mahjong connect, Sudoku, word puzzles, solitaire). References data platforms GuangdaDa and TikTok. **Dates:** Analyzes trends from January to December 2025. **Claims & Trends:** Asserts that quirky/entertaining content is becoming the core standard for ad openings, with future creatives increasingly sourced directly from TikTok trends or creator videos. Claims video creatives significantly outperform other formats in impression share for top puzzle games. **Metrics & Figures:** Features two monthly trend charts tracking: (1) advertiser volume (~7.0K–10.0K) and the percentage of advertisers launching new creatives (~76.9%–86.8%), and (2) monthly average active creatives (0–300) and new creative percentages (~43.4%–53.5%). **Evidence Types:** Sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative and Advertiser Analysis modules, utilizing platform analytics, trend forecasting, and impression share benchmarking.

       - Monthly average active creatives trend (月均在投素材量变化趋势): Percentages like 46.2%, 49.4%, etc., and numbers 0-300 across months 1-12. Shows "月均素材量" (monthly average creatives) and "当月新素材占比" (percentage of new creatives that month).
       - Claim/Insight: Mahjong connect, Sudoku, word puzzles, solitaire dominate the TOP 20 ad spend list. Video creative impression share is much higher than other categories.

   - *Definitions/Procedures:* Creative workflow/patterns (AI opening → gameplay → showcase; viral video opening → in-game recreation → showcase).
   - *Claims:* Quirky/funny content is becoming the core standard for ad openings; TikTok trends/creator videos are increasingly used for promotion; video creatives dominate impression share for puzzle/casual games.
   - *Tables/Figures/Metrics:* Two line/bar charts tracking monthly advertiser counts, new creative advertiser percentages, monthly average active creatives, and new creative percentages throughout 2025. Specific percentage ranges and K-values are provided.

   - **Claims & Trends:** Quirky and entertaining content is becoming the core standard for ad openings; future creatives will increasingly source directly from TikTok trends or creator videos. Video creatives significantly outperform other formats in impression share for top puzzle games.

Specific data points range from ~7.0K to 10.0K advertisers and 0–300 average creatives, with new creative percentages fluctuating between ~43% and ~87%.
